testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Mode in SHIPPING DETAILS
testCases.notes: Cart /cart shows SHIPPING DETAILS with 'Delivery option' toggle. Pickup mode active. 'Pickup point*' field shows 'Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan, Michigan, 10094, United States of America'. Asterisk indicates required field.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Shipping Cost $0.00
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY 'Shipping cost $0.00' confirmed with Pickup mode selected. BL-SHIP-002 verified: BOPIS pickup has no shipping charge. Consistent with SMK-024.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Delivery Toggle (Pickup / Shipping)
testCases.notes: Delivery option toggle clearly shows Pickup and Shipping choices. Current state: Pickup selected. Toggle switches mode without page reload.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Point Address Displayed
testCases.notes: Pickup point address 'Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan, Michigan, 10094, United States of America' displayed in SHIPPING DETAILS. Full address format with street, city, state, zip, country.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Shipping Mode Shows Shipping Methods
testCases.notes: Switching to Shipping mode: shipping method selector appears with Fixed Rate Ground and Fixed Rate Air options (from CHK-005 verification). Shipping cost $0.00 when method selected with applicable free shipping rules.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Order Summary with Pickup
testCases.notes: Full ORDER SUMMARY visible: Subtotal $100.00, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20.00, Shipping cost $0.00, Total $119.99. No shipping charge applied for pickup mode.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Place Order with Pickup Requires All Required Fields
testCases.notes: PLACE ORDER button disabled with 'Complete all required information to proceed.' validation. Billing address required even for pickup orders. Pickup point field required (marked *).

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Available at Branches Filter in Search
testCases.notes: 'Available at branches' filter visible in search results. Filters products available at configured branch. Bridges search and BOPIS availability.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — XPickup Integration Visible
testCases.notes: XPickup queries (pickupLocation API) referenced in sprint test coverage. Pickup location 'Delancey St & Essex St' configured through XPickup mechanism. Visible through UI pickup point display.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Cart Persists with Pickup Selected
testCases.notes: Cart state with Pickup delivery option persists across page navigation. Returning to /cart shows same Pickup mode and pickup point address. Server-side cart state persistence.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Shipment Options on PDP
testCases.notes: PDP sidebar shows 'Shipment options: Check pickup locations' button. Allows users to check BOPIS availability before adding item to cart. Integrates BOPIS into PDP purchase flow.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Find a Branch Footer Link
testCases.notes: Footer 'Find a Branch' link (/branch/vendor-fulfillment) present and accessible. BOPIS branch locator accessible without authentication.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — BOPIS with B2B Org Context
testCases.notes: BOPIS pickup available for B2B org users (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight org). Org context does not restrict BOPIS availability. Pickup option shows in cart for org users.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Requires Billing Address
testCases.notes: Even in Pickup mode, billing address is required (PAYMENT DETAILS shows 'Please select a billing address'). Payment method required. Standard checkout requirements apply for BOPIS.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — CyberSource Payment Compatible with Pickup
testCases.notes: Payment method 'Bank card (CyberSource)' selectable in Pickup mode. All payment methods available regardless of delivery option selected.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — ApolloError on Cart Load with BOPIS
testCases.notes: ApolloError: 'Error trying to resolve field addOrUpdateCartShipment' appears in console even with Pickup mode selected. Error is not BOPIS-specific — same as BUG-042-001. Non-blocking for UI. Shipping section still renders correctly.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Shipping Cost Label Updates on Mode Change
testCases.notes: Shipping cost label (data-test-id: shipping-cost-label) shows $0.00 in Pickup mode. Expected to update to applicable shipping cost when switching to Delivery mode with a shipping method selected.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Address: Michigan State
testCases.notes: Pickup point 'Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan, Michigan, 10094, United States of America'. State = Michigan. Per project memory: State/Province facet only appears for USA/Canada — Michigan (USA) qualifies.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Quote Request Available with BOPIS
testCases.notes: QUOTE REQUEST section visible in cart even when Pickup delivery mode selected. B2B quote workflow available regardless of fulfillment type.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Save for Later Available with BOPIS
testCases.notes: SAVED FOR LATER section visible in cart with BOPIS pickup selected. Save-for-later functionality independent of delivery mode.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Mode Discounts Applied
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY shows Discount -$0.01 applied in Pickup mode. Promotional discounts apply regardless of delivery type. Coupon section visible in Pickup mode (DISCOUNT & COUPONS section).

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Order Comment Available with Pickup
testCases.notes: ORDER COMMENT field (0/1000 chars) visible in cart with Pickup mode. Order notes applicable for BOPIS orders.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Tax Applied to Pickup Orders
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY shows Tax +$20.00 with Pickup mode. Tax calculation applies to BOPIS orders. Tax rate based on order/product attributes, not delivery method.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Point Change
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Changing pickup point to a different location requires clicking Pickup point field and selecting different address from the faceted popup. Deferred to preserve current BOPIS state.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Vendor N/A for BOPIS Product
testCases.notes: Cart shows 'Vendor: N/A' for current product in BOPIS mode. Vendor information displayed in cart header area.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — BOPIS Flow from PDP Check
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Full flow from PDP 'Check pickup locations' → select pickup → add to cart and verify pickup carries over requires multi-step test not executed.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Inventory at Pickup Location
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying inventory count specific to selected pickup location (Delancey St branch vs. overall stock) requires xAPI fulfillmentCenter inventory query. Not feasible in UI-only test.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Mode: Place Order Blocked Without Billing
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Attempting to place BOPIS order without billing address shows validation error. Payment credentials blocker prevents full test execution.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Pickup Point Selector Popup Facets
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Opening pickup point selector to verify facets (Country, State, City, search input) deferred. Similar popup to address selector verified in CHK-003.

testCases.title: BOPIS Cart — Recently Browsed Visible with BOPIS
testCases.notes: RECENTLY BROWSED section shows 6 recent products in cart with BOPIS mode selected. Feature independent of delivery type. Cross-sell visible regardless of fulfillment.
